name: macro_reference_rule_is_token
description: A rule whose only reference is a macro call is a token (the macro ref recurses into its args).
grammar:
S <- KW
KW <- K('let')
K(X) <- < X >

name: predicate_reference_does_not_block_token
description: References that appear only inside a predicate do not make a rule a non-token.

name: keyword_guard_is_token
description: A keyword literal guarded by a negative lookahead over a rule is still a token.
